scripts.build: cd camp-manager-backend/backend && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.build:full: cd frond && npm install && npx vite build && cd ../.. && cp -r frond/dist/. camp-manager-backend/backend/public/ && cd camp-manager-backend/backend && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && npm run build
scripts.start: cd camp-manager-backend/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && npm start
